input._provenance: GeoClaw chile2010 example setrun.py + maketopo.py (v5.14.0). Okada model dtopo with the published USGS finite-fault inversion.

publishedReference.label: DART 32412 NOAA NCTR record
publishedReference.source: NOAA Center for Tsunami Research, DART buoy 32412, 2010-02-27 record

_metadata.tolerationRationale: Per-source-class default for seismic-megathrust. See scripts/geoclaw/run_scenario.py DEFAULT_TOLERANCE_BY_TYPE for the rationale (Synolakis 2008 inter-model spread + closed-form vs 2D-AMR mismatch + source-model scatter).
_metadata.comparisonStrategy: We feed the same Mw + rupture length to seismicTsunamiFromMegathrust (Phase-19 closed-form pipeline) and assert the dispersion-corrected amplitude at the gauge distance lands within ±25 % of the GeoClaw value above.
